item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Washable

about_item: Calming & Comfortable：Designed in a donut shape with raised sides,this calming dog bed creates a snug and secure space that helps ease anxiety.Ideal for pets who crave comfort and security during rest or sleep

Fluffy & Supportive：Crafted with ultra-soft plush faux fur and filled with brand-new premium polyfill,this fluffy bed offers 20% more support—perfect for relieving pressure on joints and muscles, especially for large dogs

Removable Cover & Easy Maintenance：The removable cover is machine washable for convenient cleaning.For size S,the entire bed can also be machine washed if preferred,making it easy to keep your fur baby’s space fresh and clean

Non-Slip & Durable Base：The anti-slip twill bottom keeps the bed firmly in place,preventing movement on smooth floors.It’s also 50% more tear-resistant than standard non-slip materials,offering long-lasting durability

Multiple Sizes & Stylish: Available in 4 sizes (S-XL) and 6 beautiful colors for all dogs and cats. This round bed fits perfectly in any room, offering a stylish and cozy resting spot for your fur baby

summary.text: Customers love this donut-shaped pet bed, finding it well-padded and spacious enough for dogs up to 35lbs. The bed is comfortable, easy to wash by removing the cover, and durable, with one customer noting it maintains its shape under weight. They appreciate its appearance and consider it worth the price.

authors_reviews.title: Worth it
authors_reviews.text: Photo taken 10m post-unboxing so it’s safe to say she likes it. It’s not cheap but the other XL beds I saw are like $250 which I just can’t stomach. Bought in hopes we could entice our fur bunny to sleep on it instead of on our laps in the new leather couch. It’s super soft and cuddly. It was hard to tell from the pictures how thick the bottom was, but it seems good. Got the 45” which does take up a good chunk of floor space but it’s a great size for our cane corso/lab mix.
authors_reviews.author: Karen

authors_reviews.title: Good quality, comfy, looks nice!
authors_reviews.text: Our doggie was in love with this the minute we unpacked it! She is 70 pounds and the medium is perfect for her!
authors_reviews.author: BAJ

authors_reviews.title: My Dog Loves This Bed!
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves this bed! Usually my dog has a hard time with a new bed and I'll have to return it, but he warmed right up to this one. I like that case is removable and machine washable. Our last bed wasn't like that and you'd have to wash the whole bed. It's very fluffy and reasonably priced. I would say go bigger. My dog is a miniature golden doodle and 45 pounds. He fit the 36 inches bed. I'd highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Janel

authors_reviews.title: great price
authors_reviews.text: This dog bed is great! it's soft, is a good quality and you can take covering off to wash. I like it a lot better than Mr. Fluffy dog beds(which I had) and the price is a lot less expensive.
authors_reviews.author: sandi

authors_reviews.title: The BEST dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: I rarely leave product reviews but had to leave one for this bed! It’s very well made, so soft, cozy and my dog LOVES it.
authors_reviews.author: AMD5

authors_reviews.title: GREAT PURCHASE
authors_reviews.text: This bed is amazing! My 55 pound golden retriever LOVES it!!! I got an XL but wish I got one size smaller. It’s big and fluffy. Make sure you have a good space for it.
authors_reviews.author: Wendy L

authors_reviews.title: Fluffy dog heaven
authors_reviews.text: Lovely dog bed, very soft, packaged well and huge! Wish it had a little more support. It's mostly fluff
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Best comfort dog n
authors_reviews.text: Great price point and my dog obviously loves this bed if you can tell from the pictures. The color is versatile and goes with everything. The bed immediately went to the shape advertised. Very easy to set up and my dog passes out right away.
authors_reviews.author: Kristen
